title: Amtech I5700 Socket Driver Set, Hex Extension Adapter, 3 Piece 1/4", 3/8" and 1/2", for Impact Driver
features: DURABLE: This 3 piece socket driver set is made from strong chrome vanadium steel for durability
SIZES: With a 1/4″ quick change hex shank, it includes sizes ¼" x 65mm, 3/8 inch x 65mm and ½ inch x 72mm
SECURE ACTION: A spring loaded ball bearing head holds the sockets more securely
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
